scripts.check:generated: node tools/openapi-types.mjs check && cargo run --locked -p xtask -- check-proto && node tools/check-web-dist.mjs
scripts.contracts:validate: pnpm contracts:openapi && pnpm contracts:schema && pnpm contracts:proto && pnpm contracts:gherkin
scripts.generate: pnpm generate:openapi && pnpm generate:proto && pnpm build
scripts.check:licenses: pnpm licenses list --prod --json | node tools/check-node-licenses.mjs --production && pnpm licenses list --json | node tools/check-node-licenses.mjs
